'''lajuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foeder|foeder]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foeder|foeder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lajuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læjiyith|læjiyith]] || [[word:læjiyij|læjiyij]] || [[word:læjiyish|læjiyish]] || [[word:læjiyi|læjiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lajujuyuth|lajujuyuth]] || [[word:lajujuyuj|lajujuyuj]] || [[word:lajujuyush|lajujuyush]] || [[word:lajujuyu|lajujuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lajuyuth|lajuyuth]] || [[word:lajuyuj|lajuyuj]] || [[word:lajuyush|lajuyush]] || [[word:lajuyu|lajuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lajufyuth|lajufyuth]] || [[word:lajufyuj|lajufyuj]] || [[word:lajufyush|lajufyush]] || [[word:lajufyuf|lajufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lajuyuthu|lajuyuthu]] || [[word:lajuyuju|lajuyuju]] || [[word:lajuyushu|lajuyushu]] || [[word:lajuyuku|lajuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lajuyuth|lajuyuth]] || [[word:lajuyuj|lajuyuj]] || [[word:lajuyush|lajuyush]] || [[word:lajuyu|lajuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lajuyuthul|lajuyuthul]] || [[word:lajuyujul|lajuyujul]] || [[word:lajuyushul|lajuyushul]] || [[word:lajuyukul|lajuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lajuyuthuthu|lajuyuthuthu]] || [[word:lajuyujuju|lajuyujuju]] || [[word:lajuyushushu|lajuyushushu]] || [[word:lajuyuku|lajuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lajuyuthun|lajuyuthun]] || [[word:lajuyujun|lajuyujun]] || [[word:lajuyushun|lajuyushun]] || [[word:lajuyukun|lajuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lajuyuthuoro|lajuyuthuoro]] || [[word:lajuyujuoro|lajuyujuoro]] || [[word:lajuyushuoro|lajuyushuoro]] || [[word:lajuyukuoro|lajuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
